contradictions_checked: Reviewers overriding red P11: no — :1142 requires deliverable_probe.ok before reviewer invocation

critical_review.strongest_objection: _explicit_docs_report_task substring markers (adr/benchmark/design-doc/report-only) are broad enough that incidental mentions in a code-task deliverable could relax required receipt kinds for docs-only changes.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: Evidence that deliverable probe can be skipped or reviewers can accept on red P11 at execution/outcome_review, or any failing run of the named focused tests on current tree.

assumptions_to_verify: Provided pytest receipts correspond to this exact tree; current diff and file hashes were inspected but pytest was not rerun.
Report-only marker breadth is acceptable for this slice or will be tightened in a follow-up.
Workflow P3 continues to block missing required outcome fields before deliverable verification is reached.
contradictions_checked: Live tracked diff is exactly the five claimed files with +477/-15 and no diff-check findings.
Planning P1-P4 requirements match the new probe, workflow wiring, and tests.
Red deliverable P11 cannot be accepted by final codex_decision because acceptance requires deliverable_probe.ok.
Reviewer invocation is gated on deliverable_probe.ok before Cursor or independent reviewer calls.
The outcome_review regression is non-vacuous: claim_verification is green, deliverable P11 is red, workflow blocks, and codex_decision is revise.
P11 mailbox de-dup only suppresses probe P11 when claim_verification itself failed; green claim verification leaves red P11 visible.
missing_evidence: I did not rerun pytest or py_compile in this read-only review; pass status is from provided receipts.
No direct regression test observed for cursor_review=True proving a red deliverable_probe skips reviewer invocation; source wiring supports it.
No negative test for broad report-only marker false positives such as incidental use of adr or benchmark in a non-report docs task.
critical_review.strongest_objection: Report-only detection accepts broad markers such as adr and benchmark from intent/outcome/receipt text, so a docs-only task with loose wording plus an artifact/docs receipt could be allowed more widely than intended.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: A failing run of the named focused tests, evidence that an accepted execution/outcome_review can proceed with deliverable_probe red, or a realistic non-report docs task that passes due only to broad marker matching.

outcome.summary: FINAL ACCEPT. Execution+outcome_review gates now deterministically require real deliverable evidence via verify_gate_deliverable_evidence (dual_agent_workflow.py:414) with explicit report-only allowance. Diff exactly 5 files +477/-15, --check clean. P1-P4 failure modes and report-only branch all source-backed; 6 driver tests verbatim incl non-vacuous outcome_review test (:810) where claims verify GREEN but P11 RED blocks with codex_decision==revise. stdio probe (:1128) runs on accepted exec/outcome and reviewers skip on red (:1142); mailbox surfaces P11 CRITICAL with dedup (:265).
